data.name: Monster Girl Fantasy
data.detailed_description:
Monster Girl Fantasy takes place in a medieval fantasy world where different kinds of monster girls live side by side. Recently some of the monster girls have been disappearing and there have been sightings of foreign demons. Rumors say that these demons have imprisoned monster girls and taken them as their personal slaves. Are you able to find out the truth? In order to do so, you will need to gain the trust of monster girls, deepen your relationships with them and fight your way through exotic creatures.

Can you become a hero and save the monster girls?

Features

  • Exotic fantasy world to explore
  • Choose companions from different kinds of monster girls
  • Lots of customization through skills, spells & items
  • Plenty of unique enemies to fight
  • Completely in native English

Monster Girl Fantasy takes place in a medieval fantasy world where different kinds of monster girls live side by side. Recently some of the monster girls have been disappearing and there have been sightings of foreign demons. Rumors say that these demons have imprisoned monster girls and taken them as their personal slaves. Are you able to find out the truth? In order to do so, you will need to gain the trust of monster girls, deepen your relationships with them and fight your way through exotic creatures.

Can you become a hero and save the monster girls?

Features

  • Exotic fantasy world to explore
  • Choose companions from different kinds of monster girls
  • Lots of customization through skills, spells & items
  • Plenty of unique enemies to fight
  • Completely in native English
data.short_description: Monster Girl Fantasy is an RPG that thrusts you deep into a fantasy world filled with exotic creatures and seductive monster girls. Are you able to gain the trust of monster girls and stop demons from taking them as slaves?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
